records.question: Which projects require at most 299 hours to complete?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT projects.code FROM projects
WHERE projects.hours <= 299
records.pred_sql: SELECT code FROM projects WHERE hours <= 299

records.question: Which projects named Bacterial Transformation Efficiency require at most 321 hours?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT projects.code FROM projects
WHERE projects.hours <= 321 AND projects.name = 'Bacterial Transformation Efficiency'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT projects.code
FROM projects
JOIN assignedto ON projects.code = assignedto.project
WHERE projects.name = 'Bacterial Transformation Efficiency' AND projects.hours <= 321

records.question: Which projects named A Puzzling Parallax involve Kumar Swamy and require at least 299 hours?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT projects.code FROM projects
JOIN assignedto ON projects.code = assignedto.project
JOIN scientists ON assignedto.scientist = scientists.ssn
WHERE scientists.name = 'Kumar Swamy' AND projects.name = 'A Puzzling Parallax' AND projects.hours >= 299
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.code
FROM projects p
JOIN assignedto a ON p.code = a.project
JOIN scientists s ON a.scientist = s.ssn
WHERE p.name = 'A Puzzling Parallax' AND s.name = 'Kumar Swamy' AND p.hours >= 299

records.question: Which projects that have assigned team members require at least 6546 hours?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT projects.code FROM projects
JOIN assignedto ON projects.code = assignedto.project
WHERE projects.hours >= 6546
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.code
FROM projects p
JOIN assignedto a ON p.code = a.project
GROUP BY p.code
HAVING SUM(p.hours) >= 6546
